name: autonomous-engineer
description: Autonomous engineering team for Claude Code. A main-loop Orchestrator coordinates 5 specialist subagents (Intake Analyst, Software Engineer, QA Engineer, lens-parameterized Reviewer, Engineering Manager), 11 slash commands, all namespaced to avoid Claude Code built-in collisions (/ae-start, /ae-review, /ae-qa, /ae-pr, /ae-status, /ae-resume, /ae-setup, /ae-selfcheck, /ae-clean, /ae-doctor, /ae-update — forcing classification and reading logs are flags on /ae-start and /ae-status), and 12 skills covering orchestration, the six workflow patterns, tier-aware bug & feature pipelines, ticket and PR protocols, multi-tenant validation, the persistent journey map, MCP setup, run logging, and progress reporting. Routes every ticket to a risk tier (T0/T1/T2) so depth matches risk, and ships a golden-ticket eval (/ae-selfcheck) so changes are measurable. Takes a ticket from intake to Pull Request.
